itemdesc-aptitude-glyphstone: Attunes a character to one additional class path.
itemdesc-retraining-glyphstone: Lets one learned extra class be released after confirmation.
multiclassreborn:gamemechanicinfo-multic:
Multiclass Reborn
A practiced survivor can learn more than one path.

Multiclass Reborn lets your character learn extra classes in addition to their main class. Extra classes can add traits, recipe access, and stat changes, allowing mixed builds such as a hunter who studies metalwork or a tailor who learns combat training.

Opening Class Selection
Press ctrl + k to open class selection. Your main class is listed first, followed by learned extra classes and other available classes. Select a class and choose Learn to add it when you have an open class slot.

Class Slots
Each extra class uses one class slot. Some worlds grant every player the configured maximum number of slots automatically. Other worlds require an Aptitude Glyphstone; use one to unlock one additional extra class slot. Server settings control the maximum number of extra classes.

Retraining
Extra classes are forgotten from the class selection screen and must be confirmed before anything is removed. On worlds that require glyphstones, confirming the removal consumes one Retraining Glyphstone from your hotbar. If glyphstones are not required, confirmed extra-class removal is free.

Some worlds allow the main class to be forgotten, returning the character to Commoner. Some worlds also allow Commoners to choose a new main class from class selection. Both options are server settings and may be disabled.

Glyphstone Sources
Aptitude Glyphstones and Retraining Glyphstones may be sold by luxury traders. Some servers also enable craftable glyphstone recipes. When enabled, both recipes use loose stones in the corners, a temporal gear above a rough diamond, and gold or silver bits on each side. Aptitude Glyphstones use clear quartz below the diamond; Retraining Glyphstones use a rusty gear below it.

Server Rules
Server settings can enable or disable extra-class stat bonuses, recipe traits, glyphstone crafting, glyphstone requirements, Commoner base-class choice, and main-class forgetting. Extra-class stat strength can be scaled, and overlapping trait stats can be limited to only the strongest positive bonus or harshest negative penalty.

Commands
Most play can be handled through class selection, but /multiclass summary, /multiclass list, and /multiclass available can be used to check your current slots and class options.
handbook-aptitude-glyphstone-text:
Use an Aptitude Glyphstone to unlock one extra class slot on worlds that require glyphstones. See the Multiclass Reborn guide for details.

When glyphstone crafting is enabled, craft it with a rough diamond in the center, a temporal gear above it, gold or silver bits on each side, clear quartz below it, and four loose stones in the corners. The loose stones may be mixed. Luxury traders may also sell it.
handbook-retraining-glyphstone-text:
Use a Retraining Glyphstone to open class retraining. On worlds that require glyphstones, one Retraining Glyphstone is consumed after you confirm a class removal. See the Multiclass Reborn guide for details.

When glyphstone crafting is enabled, craft it with a rough diamond in the center, a temporal gear above it, gold or silver bits on each side, a rusty gear below it, and four loose stones in the corners. The loose stones may be mixed. Luxury traders may also sell it.
multiclassreborn:handbook-aptitude-glyph:
Use an Aptitude Glyphstone to unlock one extra class slot on worlds that require glyphstones. See the Multiclass Reborn guide for details.

When glyphstone crafting is enabled, craft it with a rough diamond in the center, a temporal gear above it, gold or silver bits on each side, clear quartz below it, and four loose stones in the corners. The loose stones may be mixed. Luxury traders may also sell it.
multiclassreborn:handbook-retraining-gly:
Use a Retraining Glyphstone to open class retraining. On worlds that require glyphstones, one Retraining Glyphstone is consumed after you confirm a class removal. See the Multiclass Reborn guide for details.

When glyphstone crafting is enabled, craft it with a rough diamond in the center, a temporal gear above it, gold or silver bits on each side, a rusty gear below it, and four loose stones in the corners. The loose stones may be mixed. Luxury traders may also sell it.
